narrative:
Ashville-East (precinct in Pickaway County) has 696 registered voters, with 51.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.5 percentage points.
